title: Polish Romano Crumble
description: A savory and cheesy crumble dish made with polish sausage and topped with a crunchy romano crust.
instructions: Cook the polish sausage in a pan until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
In a separate bowl, mix together the romano cheese, savory spice, and pepper.
Grease a baking dish with light olive oil and add the cooked polish sausage.
Sprinkle the romano cheese mixture over the top of the sausage.
Add the cubed bread to the bowl and toss with the crumbs.
Spread the bread mixture evenly over the top of the sausage.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
